title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.023.1) Update
description:
Software 6.A.023.1 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • Videos will now be saved correctly when, during a recording, an incoming call is accepted.
  • The preview for Panorama mode has been fixed.
  • Miracast screen casting is now available again.
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of December, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
